messages.edit_notes_menu_prompt: ✏️ Select the note you want to edit:

messages.games_menu_prompt: 🎮 Welcome to Game Room! Choose a game:
messages.tools_menu_prompt: 🛠 Welcome to Tools Menu! Choose a tool:
messages.start: 👋 Hello! I am {bot_name}. Good to see you again. ⚠️ This bot is currently in BETA. Your feedback is very valuable to us! Please reach out to the developer for any bugs or suggestions. You can access commands by typing /menu.
messages.menu_prompt: 🏠 You are in the Main Menu. What would you like to do? 👇
messages.no_notes: 📂 You have no saved notes yet.
messages.notes_menu_prompt: Choose an action from the notes menu:
messages.prompt_select_note_to_delete: Please select the note you want to delete:
messages.unknown_command: ❓ Sorry, I didn't understand that command. Please type /menu to see available commands.
messages.addnote_no_content: Please write your note after /addnote command.
messages.remind_usage: ℹ️ Please enter a time and message. Ex: /remind 14:30 meeting or 10:00 2025-12-31 new year
messages.remind_prompt_input: ✏️ Please enter the time and message for the reminder. Ex: 14:30 meeting or 10:00 2025-12-31 new year
messages.qrcode_prompt_input: Please type the text, link, or data you want to convert to QR code:
messages.tkm_welcome: Welcome to Rock-Paper-Scissors! Choose one of the buttons below:
messages.tkm_invalid_input: Please only use buttons: Rock, Paper, or Scissors.
messages.prompt_text_for_pdf: ✏️ Please type the text you want to convert to PDF:
messages.prompt_file_for_pdf: 📂 Please send the file (image, DOCX, TXT) you want to convert to PDF:
messages.pdf_conversion_error: An error occurred while converting to PDF: {error}
messages.unsupported_file_type: Sorry, I cannot convert this file type to PDF. Please send an image (JPG, PNG), DOCX, or TXT file.
messages.docx_conversion_warning: ⚠️ DOCX to PDF conversion might require Microsoft Word or LibreOffice installed on the server. The operation may fail if not present.
messages.weather_prompt_city: 🏙️ Please enter the name of the city for which you want to get the weather:
messages.weather_city_not_found: ❌ Sorry, weather information for '{city}' not found. Please make sure you spelled the city name correctly.
messages.weather_api_error: ❌ An error occurred while fetching weather information. Please try again later.
messages.weather_select_city: 🏙️ Select the city for which you want to get the weather:
messages.developer_info_prompt: 👨‍💻 You can reach my social media accounts via the links below:
messages.reminder_menu_prompt: Choose an action from the reminders menu:
messages.no_reminders: 📂 You have no saved reminders yet.
messages.prompt_select_reminder_to_delete: 🗑️ Please select the reminder you want to delete:
messages.xox_welcome: Welcome to Tic-Tac-Toe! Click a box to make a move.
messages.xox_invalid_move: This box is taken or game is over.

📥 Video Downloader

Which platform do you want to download from?
messages.video_download_error:
❌ Could not download video. The link may be invalid or the content may be private.
Error: {error}
messages.video_file_too_large: ⚠️ Video file is too large (over 50MB). Exceeds Telegram limit.
messages.video_invalid_link: ⚠️ Invalid link. Please send a valid {platform} link.
messages.format_selection_prompt: 🎥 Which format do you want to download?
messages.ai_menu_prompt: 🤖 AI Assistant Your AI-powered chat assistant. Ask questions, get help! 📊 Daily quota: {remaining}/{limit}
messages.ai_menu_prompt_admin: 🤖 AI Assistant (Admin) Your AI-powered chat assistant. ⚡️ Status: ♾️ Unlimited Mode
messages.ai_chat_started:
🧠 AI chat mode started!

You can ask me anything. Use the button below to end.
messages.ai_chat_ended: 👋 AI chat ended. You're back to main menu.
messages.ai_limit_reached:
⚠️ You've reached your daily AI message limit (30/30).
Try again tomorrow!
messages.ai_error: ❌ An error occurred while AI was responding. Please try again.
messages.ai_api_error: ❌ AI service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
messages.shazam_menu_prompt: 🎵 Shazam - Music Finder To find a song: 🎤 Send an Audio/Voice file, 🎥 Send a Video file, 🔗 Paste an Instagram/TikTok/Twitter link.

❌ Insufficient funds! You need {amount} coins for this.
Current: {balance}
